successCriteria.description: src/modules/notification/notification.service.ts exists and exports NotificationService class implementing INotificationService interface
NotificationService uses INotificationRepository dependency via constructor injection
NotificationService uses AuditLogger dependency via constructor injection for audit logging
All state-changing operations (create, update) write audit records with sanitized data to satisfy GP-004
tests/unit/modules/notification/notification.service.test.ts exists with Vitest tests covering all public methods with >90% coverage

constraints: GP-001: Repository pattern - All database access goes through INotificationRepository interface
GP-002: Audit records - All state-changing operations write an audit record via AuditLogger
GP-004: No sensitive data in logs - All notification data must be sanitized before logging
GP-006: Error handling - No unhandled promise rejections, all async errors must be caught and handled
Dependency injection - NotificationService must accept INotificationRepository and AuditLogger via constructor
Transaction separation - Notification creation/update and audit logging must execute in separate database transactions
TypeScript - Must use TypeScript with proper type annotations
Modular monolith architecture - Must follow project's modular structure with notification module
outOfScope: Notification UI components or frontend integration
Integration with leave module (will be done in Phase 10)
Authentication or authorization for notification access
